tool_input.description: Count all markdown files using glob
tool_input.prompt: Count all .md (markdown) files in the repository. Search for the pattern **/*.md starting from the repository root at /home/user/agentdeck. Return the total count of .md files found.

tool_response.prompt: Count all .md (markdown) files in the repository. Search for the pattern **/*.md starting from the repository root at /home/user/agentdeck. Return the total count of .md files found.
